attributes.title: [Azure Activity Logs OTel] Platform Health
attributes.description: Azure platform health signals: ServiceHealth incidents, ResourceHealth status, and Advisor recommendations. Monitor external reliability factors.

params.markdown:
## [Azure Activity Logs OTel] Platform Health

This dashboard monitors Azure platform health signals:
- Service health incidents and maintenance events
- Resource health status and state transitions
- Active recommendations with impact and affected resources
- Active alerts and monitoring signals
- Detailed event logs for incident investigation

query.esql:
FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ServiceHealth"
| WHERE azure.servicehealth.incident.type == "Incident"
| STATS incidents = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ServiceHealth"
| WHERE azure.servicehealth.incident.type == "Incident"
| STATS incidents = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ResourceHealth"
| WHERE azure.resourcehealth.state IN ("Unavailable", "Degraded")
| STATS unhealthy = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ResourceHealth"
| WHERE azure.resourcehealth.state IN ("Unavailable", "Degraded")
| STATS unhealthy = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Recommendation"
| STATS recommendations = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Recommendation"
| STATS recommendations = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Alert"
| WHERE azure.result.type IN ("Activated", "Active")
| STATS alerts = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Alert"
| WHERE azure.result.type IN ("Activated", "Active")
| STATS alerts = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ServiceHealth"
| WHERE azure.servicehealth.incident.type == "Maintenance"
| STATS maintenance = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ServiceHealth"
| WHERE azure.servicehealth.incident.type == "Maintenance"
| STATS maintenance = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ServiceHealth"
| WHERE azure.servicehealth.incident.type IS NOT NULL
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), azure.servicehealth.incident.type
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ServiceHealth"
| WHERE azure.servicehealth.incident.type IS NOT NULL
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), azure.servicehealth.incident.type
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ResourceHealth"
| WHERE azure.resourcehealth.state IS NOT NULL
| WHERE cloud.resource_id IS NOT NULL
| EVAL ts_state = CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS", @timestamp), "|", azure.resourcehealth.state)
| STATS latest = MV_LAST(MV_SORT(VALUES(ts_state))) BY cloud.resource_id
| EVAL state = MV_LAST(SPLIT(latest, "|"))
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY state
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 6

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ResourceHealth"
| WHERE azure.resourcehealth.state IS NOT NULL
| WHERE cloud.resource_id IS NOT NULL
| EVAL ts_state = CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS", @timestamp), "|", azure.resourcehealth.state)
| STATS latest = MV_LAST(MV_SORT(VALUES(ts_state))) BY cloud.resource_id
| EVAL state = MV_LAST(SPLIT(latest, "|"))
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY state
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 6

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ServiceHealth"
| WHERE azure.servicehealth.service IS NOT NULL
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*) BY azure.servicehealth.service
| SORT event_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ServiceHealth"
| WHERE azure.servicehealth.service IS NOT NULL
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*) BY azure.servicehealth.service
| SORT event_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Recommendation"
| WHERE azure.recommendation.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS affected_resources = COUNT_DISTINCT(cloud.resource_id), last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY azure.recommendation.name, azure.recommendation.category, azure.recommendation.impact
| EVAL impact_rank = CASE(azure.recommendation.impact == "High", 1, azure.recommendation.impact == "Medium", 2, azure.recommendation.impact == "Low", 3, 4)
| SORT impact_rank ASC, affected_resources DESC
| DROP impact_rank
| LIMIT 50

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Recommendation"
| WHERE azure.recommendation.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS affected_resources = COUNT_DISTINCT(cloud.resource_id), last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY azure.recommendation.name, azure.recommendation.category, azure.recommendation.impact
| EVAL impact_rank = CASE(azure.recommendation.impact == "High", 1, azure.recommendation.impact == "Medium", 2, azure.recommendation.impact == "Low", 3, 4)
| SORT impact_rank ASC, affected_resources DESC
| DROP impact_rank
| LIMIT 50

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ResourceHealth"
| WHERE azure.resourcehealth.cause IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY azure.resourcehealth.cause
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 5

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ResourceHealth"
| WHERE azure.resourcehealth.cause IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY azure.resourcehealth.cause
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 5

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ServiceHealth"
| KEEP @timestamp, azure.servicehealth.title, azure.servicehealth.incident.type, azure.servicehealth.state, azure.servicehealth.service, azure.servicehealth.region
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 50

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ServiceHealth"
| KEEP @timestamp, azure.servicehealth.title, azure.servicehealth.incident.type, azure.servicehealth.state, azure.servicehealth.service, azure.servicehealth.region
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 50

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ResourceHealth"
| KEEP @timestamp, azure.resourcehealth.state, azure.resourcehealth.previous_state, azure.resourcehealth.title, azure.resourcehealth.cause, cloud.resource_id
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 50

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "ResourceHealth"
| KEEP @timestamp, azure.resourcehealth.state, azure.resourcehealth.previous_state, azure.resourcehealth.title, azure.resourcehealth.cause, cloud.resource_id
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 50
